candidates.title: Memory-V2V: Memory-Augmented Video-to-Video Diffusion for Consistent Multi-Turn Editing
candidates.recommendation_reason: Directly studies iterative generative editing and cross-turn consistency, close to process-level generation and creative editing workflows.
candidates.risk_or_uncertainty: Exact quantitative table values, ablation contributions, computational overhead, consistency metrics, and failure cases require formal deep reading.
candidates.evidence_location: PDF text cache, no reliable page map

candidates.title: PersonaVLM: Long-Term Personalized Multimodal LLMs
candidates.recommendation_reason: Useful for long-term personalization, memory, interaction design, and evaluation dimensions in personalized multimodal agents.
candidates.risk_or_uncertainty: Benchmark construction, personality update mechanism, ablation logic, full baseline tables, and ecological validity require formal deep reading.
